summary: Both REQ-1 and REQ-2 are implemented in the diff. REQ-1 is addressed by adding a Lucide Settings gear icon in Footer.tsx with the correct default color, hover glow effect via CSS in index.css, far-right alignment, 10px margin above the copyright line, and a click handler that opens the DeveloperControlCenter modal. REQ-2 is addressed in App.tsx by reducing the View History button margin from mt-12 to mt-6. The hooks/useQueries.ts file was modified despite the immutable path constraint.

hallucinated_features.description: frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts was modified to add useGetAdminKeys and useSetAdminKeys hooks
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request explicitly states 'Do not modify files under frontend/src/hooks/ as they are immutable paths.' The diff shows useQueries.ts was modified to add two new hooks. While functionally necessary for DeveloperControlCenter, this violates a stated constraint.
